description_long: This is a rectangular milk carton with a dark exterior and a green screw cap located at the top corner. One side features a large, high-contrast label with a missing child alert, including a black-and-white photograph and detailed text. The opposite side is plain except for the word 'Milk' in large, light-colored letters. The remaining two sides are unadorned, with one being a solid dark color and the other a lighter, slightly reflective surface. The carton appears to be made of coated cardboard or laminated paperboard, typical for beverage containers, and is likely hollow inside. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear labeling and a functional closure.
description: Rectangular milk carton with a green screw cap, featuring a missing child alert label and 'Milk' text on opposite sides. The body is dark with a slightly reflective surface and minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the missing child alert label with a photo and detailed text, as well as the green cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, dark surface with no visible markings or labels, and the cap visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view with a lighter, slightly reflective surface and no visible text or graphics, cap at the top corner.
description_view_3: Side view with the word 'Milk' in large, light-colored letters on a dark background, cap at the top.
attribute_label_or_branding: One side has a large missing child alert label with a black-and-white photo and detailed text; another side has the word 'Milk' in large, light-colored letters. No other branding or logos are visible.
